parallel.description: Must be true — signals that items should be processed concurrently

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier. Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

inputFiles.description: References to previously uploaded files to be used as inputs for this operation

fileId.description: ID of a previously uploaded file (from POST /files/upload)

role.description: Role identifier for the file (e.g. 'step-input'). Determines how the file is used during processing.

outputFormats.description: Per-item output format overrides. If omitted, the task produces raw result data.

items.description: A single operation within a compound (parallel) task. Each item runs independently.
items.title: CompoundItem

items.description: List of independent CAD operations to execute in parallel. Each item becomes a sub-task.

schema.description: Execute multiple independent Bitbybit CAD operations in parallel. Each item runs as a separate sub-task and can be polled individually.
schema.title: CompoundExecuteBody
